profiles.description: Use when the operator wants the repo-owned control plane to keep the standing lane moving, rotate to the next child issue automatically, and proactively fill safe worker-slot capacity.

profiles.summary: Bias toward the current live standing lane.
profiles.description: Use when the current standing PR should be merged before additional support-lane expansion continues.

profiles.summary: Treat the current-head regression as the immediate objective.
profiles.description: Use when a required check is red on the live lane and widening scope would just add churn.

profiles.summary: Rebuild the tracked queue before new implementation work.
profiles.description: Use when standing-priority is missing, only epics remain open, or child-issue intake has drifted.

profiles.summary: Use available worker-slot capacity to prepare one disjoint support slice.
profiles.description: Use when queue health needs another disjoint support lane prepared or refreshed while worker-slot capacity remains.
